lower back痛通常一係 ankle/hip mobility太差搞到lower back rounding
一係quads/core太廢搞到good morning squat用太多lower back
同意glute activation太差都會搞到lower back代償 lower back過分受壓
尤其good morning squat情況下更加閪多兩錢重

腰痛成因仲痛好多種，
IAP做得唔好
QL本身過緊
上半身個form 炒左
甚至企既時候腳掌重心分佈會影響個path
邊到強邊到弱唔識發力
去左代償
種種連帶關係無專業既人係唔識睇
有唔同專業角度出發睇件事都有唔同意見或關於點唔同
上網同人講呢d除非大家都有返咁上下知識，識分析同了解後背出發點
如果唔係只有你有你講，我有我講

一樣大把elite weightlifter做squat係用knee落先

基本上squat全程bar path維持喺mid foot即係重心位置就ok

Are you talking about you can squat without activating your glutes?
As I said, If your hips extend, your glutes were activated. You can't really do it without them. It’s really ridiculous thing I have heard that you can squat without activating your glutes. Please look at the anatomy of glutes.

The point I want to say is even you’re more Quad dominant, your back can still remains straight.
Exercise such as lunges and leg presses are more quad dominant, it doesn’t cause lower back pain.
